name: social-media-helpers
description: Python tools for managing and growing a social media presence — photo sorting, viral content tracking, and Instagram analytics.

plugins.name: photo-sorter
plugins.description: Auto-sort your Photos library into custom albums using Claude AI vision. Define your own album names and criteria on first run.

plugins.name: viral-content-analysis
plugins.description: Track competitor Instagram accounts and surface top-performing posts, hooks, and content formats into Notion.

plugins.name: instagram-stats
plugins.description: Refresh your Instagram post and reel stats in an Excel planning sheet via the Instagram Graph API.
